notes: I've tried Steam's Proton 5.13-6 up to Proton Experimental. I've also tried GE Proton 7-30 and 7-35. None have loaded this game yet to the main title screen. Some seem to load longer and stay running, however the no menus or screens load up.
title: Tor Eternum

notes: Game plays 100% fine with GE Proton 7-29, especially if you go into actual gameplay in less than a min. Don't idle on menu.
title: Tor Eternum
